name: Icanic Brands Company Inc.
summary: Icanic Brands Company Inc. provides life enhancement products in Canada. The company owns license for X-Sprays, a brand of life enhancement products administered through an oral spray delivery system. It markets and sells dietary supplements for nonmedical use primarily cannabinoid and cannabis-infused sprays, as well as non-cannabis infused sprays. The company was formerly known as Integrated Cannabis Company, Inc. and changed its name to Icanic Brands Company Inc. in February 2020. Icanic Brands Company Inc. is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
